atomicity.message: VORCH-07 verifier doctor report-only changes are one feature slice.

conditions.message: The staged verifier doctor code is formatted, diff-check clean, and keeps unsupported runtime formats as report findings instead of fake executable enforcement or repair advice.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 ran git diff --cached --check and gofmt in an isolated staged worktree; both were clean.
ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected verifier_doctor.go and confirmed malformed/unsupported content reports supported=false or warnings without fake enforcement.

conditions.message: Doctor logic is factored into a testable internal helper with a thin CLI wrapper; path candidates, parsing, and result construction are centralized rather than duplicated in command code.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 inspected RunVerifierDoctor, verifierDoctorCandidates, runVerifierDoctorRuntime, parseVerifierDoctorConfig, and verifierDoctorKnownKey.
BrightOwl 2766 confirmed the CLI adds one verifier doctor command delegating to RunVerifierDoctor rather than duplicating parser logic.

conditions.message: The doctor report is explicitly non-evidence and non-authoritative for unknown configs: it returns report_only true, warns on unsupported/malformed configs, and next steps avoid exact edits.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 verified ReportOnly true and next steps saying not to treat authorization or the doctor report as per-cell verifier evidence.
BrightOwl 2766 verified the malformed config CLI test asserts supported=false and rejects exact set/write edit instructions.

conditions.message: The doctor behavior has direct coverage for known runtime values, malformed configs, no-write behavior, JSON/human CLI output, robot help, and report-only guidance.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected internal tests for known runtime values, malformed configs, and no-write candidate-file behavior.
ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected CLI and robot help tests, then ran focused doctor tests in an isolated staged-slice worktree; all passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload implements the bead's report-only doctor command, runtime path checks, known limit extraction, supported:false handling, no-write coverage, human/robot help, and no VORCH-06 regression observed.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 compared the bead acceptance criteria against staged implementation and tests.
BrightOwl 2766 ran focused CLI/internal doctor tests and full go test ./... in a clean staged snapshot; all passed.

conditions.message: Verifier evidence is recorded with hash binding, staged-path confirmation, no-write inspection, and independent staged-slice command results.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 regenerated verifier prompts and confirmed staged hash sha256:6497... with exactly the five staged doctor files and no hash-excluded payload.
ScarletMarsh 2765 ran verifier doctor --json and full go test ./... in an isolated staged-slice worktree; all passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload is limited to the VORCH-07 doctor feature and tests; unrelated .beads, docs, logs, and response/transcript artifacts are unstaged.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 confirmed git status and git diff --cached show only the five VORCH-07 payload files staged.
BrightOwl 2766 confirmed unrelated .beads, docs, failed reports, responses, and transcripts are unstaged.

conditions.message: The governed no-write surface was inspected: production doctor code reads candidate config paths and reports findings only; it does not write, repair, stage, commit, or mutate hooks/config files.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 searched verifier_doctor.go and found production use of os.UserHomeDir, os.Stat, and os.ReadFile only; no write/remove/rename/chmod/exec/git/stage/repair calls.
ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected the no-write test asserting candidate config body, mode, and mtime remain unchanged.

conditions.message: The doctor command does not persist data; its governed data behavior is accurate read-only reporting of candidate path existence, supported status, warnings, and known limit/depth values.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 confirmed the helper uses os.UserHomeDir, os.Stat, and os.ReadFile only with no write/create/remove/exec/git/stage/repair calls.
BrightOwl 2766 inspected result models for checked paths, supported booleans, warnings, and known limit values with source/status metadata.

conditions.message: The doctor command reads only local runtime config candidates under repo/home paths, does not add network/auth/secret behavior, and does not repair or stage config.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 inspected local .claude/.codex/.ntm and home config candidate paths plus stat/read-only handling.
BrightOwl 2766 confirmed staged files do not include auth, network, secret, package manager, hook mutation, or external API code paths.

conditions.message: No governed visual-regression surface is present in this staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected staged paths and diff and found Go CLI command/help output, report printing, runtime config parsing, and tests only.
ScarletMarsh 2765 confirmed no browser UI, canvas, CSS, responsive layout, image, or visual-diff surface was added.

conditions.message: The governed performance surface is bounded: doctor checks a fixed candidate-path list for three runtimes and reads only existing config files.
evidence: ScarletMarsh 2765 inspected verifierDoctorCandidates and confirmed fixed candidate path lists, not recursive scans.
ScarletMarsh 2765 confirmed runVerifierDoctorRuntime stats fixed candidates, skips missing paths, and reads only existing config files; full go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The payload respects the autonomy boundary: doctor is report-only, next steps require human/docs judgment for unsupported formats, and it explicitly says the report is not per-cell verification evidence.
evidence: BrightOwl 2766 verified ReportOnly true and NextSteps requiring docs/repo-owner consultation for unsupported formats.
BrightOwl 2766 verified robot help asserts never per-cell verifier evidence and doctor --json reports report_only true without mutating edit instructions.
